home.quizCtaDesc: 10 questions across movement, sleep, stress, and nutrition. Takes 2 minutes.
home.aboutDesc: We write about clean eating, functional movement, K-Beauty routines, and natural health. Everything here is based on personal experience and actual research, not trends or sponsorships.
home.slideWellness: Wellness, grounded in what actually works.
home.slideWellnessDesc: Clean eating, functional movement, K-Beauty routines, and natural health from people who live it.
home.slideTable: From the Farmers Market to Your Table
home.slideTableDesc: Seasonal, whole-food cooking that nourishes from the inside out.
home.slideKBeautyDesc: Korean skincare, simplified. Real routines from real people.
home.toolsDesc: Interactive tools to support your wellness journey. Personalised plans, healthy recipes, and more.
home.mastheadSub: Research-first wellness from a naturopath, a chef, and a movement coach. Slow protocols, seasonal recipes, and the tools we actually use. Never wellness-as-identity.
home.mastheadMeta:
Founded 2024
New York · Stockholm · Kyoto
3 contributors
No sponsored reviews
home.protocolDesc: Ten questions. Six minutes. A personalized daily rhythm — food, movement, sleep, and the herbs your body is asking for this season. Printable. No email required.
home.protocolStep1Desc: Warm or cool, dry or damp — your body's baseline.
home.protocolStep2Desc: Sleep, sunlight, the two levers that fix most things.
home.protocolStep3Desc: Real food first. Herbs only where there's a gap.

footer.brandDesc: Research-first wellness, written slowly. A publication by three friends.
footer.newsletterDesc: One essay, one recipe, one protocol. Sent Sunday mornings. A pause from the scroll. Unsubscribe any time.
footer.editorsQuote: “Wellness isn't a product category — it's the quiet practice of noticing what your body is already saying.”

newsletter.title: Worth opening on a Monday morning.
newsletter.description: Real food ideas, movement tips, and skincare picks we've tested ourselves. Comes out weekly. You can always unsubscribe.

categoryDescriptions.nutrition: Ancestral eating, whole foods, anti-seed-oil cooking, and the gut-skin connection.
categoryDescriptions.movement: Functional fitness, mobility work, walking, and outdoor activity. no gym required.
categoryDescriptions.kBeauty: Korean skincare routines, ingredient guides, layering techniques, and honest product reviews.
categoryDescriptions.naturalHealth: Sleep, stress management, adaptogens, toxin-free living, and the wellness triangle.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.heading: Page Not Found
notFound.message: It looks like this page has wandered off the path. No worries, there's plenty to explore back home.
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist. Browse our latest articles on nutrition, movement, K-Beauty, and natural health.

quiz.title: Discover Your Wellness Archetype
quiz.description: Discover your wellness archetype across movement, sleep, stress, and nutrition. 10 questions, 2 minutes, personalised results.
quiz.intro: 10 questions across movement, sleep, stress, and nutrition. No right or wrong answers, just honest ones.
quiz.matchingArchetype: Matching you with your wellness archetype
quiz.quickStartDesc: Small steps, real progress. Start today.
quiz.aiPlanDesc: A detailed 7-day plan tailored to your exact scores and archetype.
quiz.aiPlanError: Couldn't generate your AI plan right now.
quiz.shareDesc: Let others discover their archetype too

runningPlan.title: Running Plan Generator
runningPlan.description: Get a personalised training plan for your next race. Choose your distance and experience level, and our AI coach will create a week-by-week programme just for you.
runningPlan.distance5kDesc: Your first race or a new PR
runningPlan.levelBeginnerDesc: New to running or less than 3 months
runningPlan.disclaimerText: This AI-generated training plan is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. Consult a physician before starting any exercise program. Listen to your body, progress gradually, and stop if you experience pain. Rooted Glow is not responsible for injuries resulting from following this plan.

recipeGenerator.title: Recipe Generator
recipeGenerator.description: Tell us what you're in the mood for, your dietary goals, and any restrictions. Our AI chef will create a healthy, whole-food recipe just for you.
recipeGenerator.disclaimer: This AI-generated recipe is for inspiration only. Check all ingredients for allergens. Nutritional values are estimates.

library.title: Everything we've written.
library.sub: Every essay, in one place. Published weekly, research-first.

shop.title: What we actually use.
shop.sub: Mirai × Rooted tinctures (formulated with us) alongside trusted third-party picks. Everything here has been used by the editors for at least 90 days.
shop.disclosure: Mirai × Rooted tinctures are made with us and labeled clearly. Everything else is from trusted third parties; affiliate links fund this site.

letter.title:
One slow read,
every Sunday.
letter.sub: One essay, one recipe, one protocol. Sent Sunday mornings. Designed to be read with coffee — not while commuting.
letter.card1Desc: A long-form field note from our editors.
letter.card2Desc: A herb, a meal, a movement — short and useful.
letter.card3Desc: Something to sit with through the week.

toolsHub.title: The toolkit.
toolsHub.sub: Five calm tools we actually use. Free, no login, no data sold. We add one new tool each season — last updated Spring 2026.
toolsHub.suggestDesc: We build tools readers actually ask for. Sleep tracking, cycle-aware nutrition, and a food-as-medicine glossary are next. Subscribe to hear when each ships — and tell us what else you'd want.
toolsHub.cardQuizDesc: Ten questions. A personalized wellness archetype and 7-day plan — movement, sleep, stress, and nutrition, tuned to how you already live.
toolsHub.cardSeasonalDesc: What your body actually needs in Spring, Summer, Fall, and Winter. Adaptogens to rotate, foods to favor, and how much daylight to chase.
toolsHub.cardHerbsDesc: Every herb we recommend, cross-referenced with dose, timing, contraindications, and research. Searchable. Printable.
toolsHub.cardRecipesDesc: Filter seasonal recipes by meal, cook time, and goal. Built for the way we actually cook — not for the algorithm.
toolsHub.cardRunningDesc: AI-built week-by-week training plans for 5K, 10K, and half marathon. Tuned to your experience and weekly km.

seasonal.title: The seasonal guide.
seasonal.sub: Your body isn't the same in February as in July. Rotate what you eat, how you move, and which herbs you take with the season.
seasonal.herbsNote: Rotate — don't stack. Start at lowest effective dose. Six-week commitment.

herbs.title: The herb index.
herbs.sub: Dose, timing, what it's for, what it's not. Cross-referenced with PubMed. Reviewed by a naturopath.
herbs.resultsNone: Nothing matches — try another search term.
